headline: Can PPL's Cost-Control Efforts Support Long-Term Earnings Growth?
summary: PPL Corporation's cost controls are lowering O&M expenses while supporting a $23 billion investment plan and 6-8% annual EPS growth through 2029

headline: Should You Add NextEra Energy to Your Portfolio Before Q2 Earnings?
summary: NextEra Energy heads into Q2 earnings with rising Florida demand and renewable additions, though valuation and gas-project costs cloud the outlook.

headline: B of A Securities Maintains Buy on PPL, Lowers Price Target to $39
summary: B of A Securities  analyst Ross Fowler   maintains PPL (NYSE:PPL) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $42 to $39.
